summary: P13: local retry queue — IndexedDB-persisted offline queue with backoff retry, replay on relaunch, indicator

resolution.note: Offline IndexedDB-persisted retry queue with exponential backoff (2s-60s). Drain on app load + on window.online event. 4xx terminal, 5xx + network errors retried. Optimistic UI stays during offline. 'N offline' badge in header. Phone airplane-mode verification deferred to user.
